hero.headline:
Recruiting is complicated.
Your app shouldn't be.
hero.subtext: Built by a real baseball dad for real baseball families, ExtraBase is the only recruiting app made for ball players only. Easy-to-use, priced by people who know how much travel ball costs (ouch), and fun - ExtraBase gives you exactly what you need and nothing you don't.

steps.title: Build Your Profile
steps.description: Tell us a little bit about yourself. Takes less than two minutes.

steps.title: Build Your List
steps.description: Research and rate D1, D2, D3 & JUCO programs, track recruiting updates, and organize your recruiting journey in one place.

steps.title: Get AI Matches
steps.description: Need help finding your dream school? Our AI matches you with baseball programs that fit you and your goals.

testimonial.quote: It was really hard to keep track of everything and there are so many schools out there - it's hard to know where to start. I wish my dad had made this for me before I committed!

pricing.title: Simple Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: We priced this at $25 a year because we want it to be helpful, not another financial burden. You can even get it free for 5 days. Cancel anytime if it's not for you.
features: Track your recruiting journey in one place
Built by baseball parents who lived this process

whyWeBuiltThis.title: Why We Built ExtraBase
paragraphs: We are Robert, Sarah and Jack (the ball player). As parents, we found ourselves sitting at our kitchen table in Utah with a talented but stressed out kid, recruiting services promising us the moon, an inbox full of invites, and absolutely no clue how to manage any of it. We tried building a spreadsheet, but it wasn't enough. The process felt like it was controlling us instead of the other way around.
We looked for a tool that could help us, but they were all more complicated than the recruiting process itself. So we built our own.

whatWeDontDo.title: What We Won't Do
whatWeDontDo.text: The recruiting journey should be fun for kids and their families, but all too often it is also full of people who make promises they can't keep, so-called recruiting consultants who offer shortcuts to nowhere for a price, and apps that buy and sell your information as currency. We don't and won't do any of that. We make no promises that your kid will play college ball, we don't believe in shortcuts, and we'll NEVER sell your information to anyone.
